items.title: This 2007 Throwback Could Earn You $50,000, Check Your Junk Drawer Now
items.description: Investment guru Adam Koprucki has a surprising suggestion for Americans looking to boost their wealth: dig out your old tech and toys. According to Koprucki, items like first-generation Apple products and nostalgic toys could soon be worth more than many traditional investments. Koprucki, the founder of Real World Investor, believes that some everyday items gathering dust in homes could outperform stock portfolios by 2030. items.title: Jamf (JAMF) Valuation: Weighing Analyst Optimism After Major Platform Updates and New AI Integrations
items.description: Jamf Holding (JAMF) drew renewed investor interest after its 16th annual Jamf Nation User Conference in Denver. The event highlighted major product updates, new AI-driven workflows, and expanded partner integrations across its Apple device management platform. See our latest analysis for Jamf Holding. Building on the excitement from its product showcase and growing industry partnerships, Jamf's share price has recently shown some short-term momentum with a 23.5% rise over the past 90 days...

items.title: Our Faces No Longer Belong to Us
items.description: Your likeness is now fair game for AI. Anyone is a click away from creating a digital version of you.

items.title: 1 Reason to Hold on to MP Materials Stock Right Now
items.description: MP Materials stock has rocketed higher over the past three months, but it could still be a long-term hold for more aggressive investors.
